title: Simple Textures
description: Simple Textures gives Minecraft a cleaner, easier look. It keeps the vanilla style but removes clutter so survival and building feel sharper and more focused.
body: Simple Textures is a clean and lightweight pack that makes Minecraft feel easier on the eyes. It smooths out cluttered visuals while keeping the familiar vanilla style intact, so survival runs and creative builds feel more focused and less distracting. Whether you’re mining deep underground or building something big, the simplified look helps you spot what matters without losing the charm of the game.
